needs_human.summary: yaml_loader.py (M1-2 / PR #6) implemented a stricter schema than design.md §4.1 — rejects all 5 real cases (field-name mismatch: id/on/driver/run vs name/kind/sql; category=bug-regression vs bug_regression; setup/teardown as list[step] vs list[str]). The M1-11 dogfood script side-steps this with an in-script normalizer. M2 should re-align yaml_loader with §4.1 (and update API /cases to surface them as valid).

sql_driver (M1-5 / PR #10) does not populate StepResult.plan_text from EXPLAIN output — the EXPLAIN result rows land in stdout, not plan_text. lg-bug-0001 dogfood shows assertion `plan_contains: [Hash, tmp_test02]` FAILing because plan_text is None even though the EXPLAIN plain text in stdout clearly shows tmp_test02 as hash build side (i.e., BUG actually upstream-fixed). M2 should: (a) detect EXPLAIN-shaped queries in sql_driver and store the concatenated result rows in StepResult.plan_text, OR (b) make assertions._plan_contains fall back to stdout when plan_text is None. Option (b) is the smaller change.

lg-bug-0005 setup step `DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS mydb` errors because psycopg's default autocommit=False puts DROP DATABASE inside a transaction (DROP DATABASE cannot run in a transaction block). Either (a) sql_driver should detect DDL-that-cannot-run-in-tx (CREATE DATABASE, DROP DATABASE, ALTER SYSTEM, REINDEX with CONCURRENTLY etc.) and switch the connection to autocommit before running, OR (b) the case YAML should add a per-step flag like `autocommit: true`. preflight runner has the same issue documented somewhere. M2 task.

notes: M1 sprint complete. 11 items done (M1-1 through M1-11) + 4 prep items + 1 phase-2 follow-up. 15 PRs merged total. M1-11 dogfood verdict: GO with 3 pass / 1 fail / 1 error — runner is wired correctly; 2 case-specific issues (lg-bug-0001 plan_text wiring, lg-bug-0005 autocommit-for-DDL) recorded as M2 needs_human items.
